prompt: Create formatter.js that exports a 'format(code)' function for basic JavaScript formatting. It should: normalize indentation to 2 spaces, add spaces around operators (=, +, -, ===, !==, etc), ensure opening braces are on the same line as the statement, remove trailing whitespace, and ensure a final newline. Do not use any external libraries. A sample messy.js is in the workspace for testing.
description: Build a basic JS code formatter without external dependencies
